customers_say: Customers find the water purifier to be of good quality, easy to use, and appreciate its taste, with one noting it matches normal ground water. The installation process is straightforward, and the water quality receives positive feedback, with one customer mentioning it effectively improves drinking water quality. The reliability and value for money receive mixed reviews - while some say it functions well and offers good value, others report it stops working completely and consider it not worth the investment. Service experiences are also mixed, with some finding it dependable while others report poor service.

reviews.author: Pravin Dhumal
reviews.title: Best purifier
reviews.body: Best RO for Muncipal and Borewell water. Value for money.

reviews.author: ramamohanreddy k
reviews.title: Kent new model
reviews.body: Kent water purifier with big size and classy look &good for tds .

reviews.author: Ratan
reviews.title: Installation of water purifier
reviews.body: Good product. Installation done very smoothly.Staff came to install the purifier as per my convenience as I was busy He came at 730 p.m.He was very well behaved and cooperative.

reviews.author: Teow meow
reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.body: Good product. Was installed quickly by the Kent employee.

reviews.author: Pawan Kumar
reviews.title: Excellent Product
reviews.body: "I recently purchased the Kent Supreme Plus Arrow water purifier, and my experience has been fantastic so far. Its Alkaline Copper RO+UV+UF+TDS controller system purifies the water completely and makes it taste great. The water quality has improved significantly, and it tastes clean and sweet now. The 7-liter storage tank is perfect for my family, and its compact design takes up very little space in the kitchen. Kent’s brand value and service are highly dependable. If you are looking for an excellent and reliable RO purifier on a budget, Kent Arrow is the best option. 5 stars from my side!"
